name: Wally's Wonderful World Of Magic
description:
You are thoroughly impressed with the thousands of magic items on display
here (very few are actually for sale, though) which leads you to believe that
Wally is no man to be trifled with.  The magic items range from things like
Lila's Book of Infinite Problems to things like Wand of High Frog Jumping (to
help your frog win in those;high stake frog races).  Broadway is to the east
and the Entrance to the Mages' Guild is to the west.
